creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
Try doing a "make checksum" in /usr/ports/devel/mingw32-bin-msvcrt, and see what 
it does.  It should fetch the files, and then do a check on their checksums. 
When it does fetch them, see what Sourceforge mirror it downloaded from.  The 
first one is usually heanet unless you changed the order yourself.

Thanks,
Naram Qashat
